snippet.title: Top Gun
snippet.description: The Top Gun Naval Fighter Weapons School is where the best of the best train to refine their elite flying skills. When hotshot fighter pilot Maverick (Tom Cruise) is sent to the school, his reckless attitude and cocky demeanor put him at odds with the other pilots, especially the cool and collected Iceman (Val Kilmer). But Maverick isn't only competing to be the top fighter pilot, he's also fighting for the attention of his beautiful flight instructor, Charlotte Blackwood (Kelly McGillis).

snippet.title: I Got BANISHED to the Minecraft Void
snippet.description:
After my biggest enemy, ThatMidnight from the Council, captured me and my friend Supzec, we were banished to the Minecraft End void with no items to our name and very limited food.

Heartless Horizon is a scripted story driven Hardcore Minecraft SMP where every event connects into one massive, intertwined narrative.

Become an OG and Join The Heartless Horizon's Public Server: 
- https://discord.gg/heartlesshrzn

Follow The Heartless Horizon Twitter Account: 
- https://x.com/heartlesshrzn

Like ParrotX2 and his Unstable Universe series where he broke into Minecraft's Most Secure Prisons or got Hunted by Minecraft's Deadliest Players. This is a new and original Minecraft idea like HermitCraft or Lifesteal with Wemmbu, FlameFrags, or Spoke. Survival is harder than Hardcore Minecraft because PVP is on. Heartless Horizon is an Anarchy Hardcore Server. I Got BANISHED to the Minecraft Void. 65,493. This is similar to Sharkilz video about "I Got BANISHED on My School's Minecraft SMP". It is inspired by him.

#HeartlessHorizon

snippet.title: I became an Immortal Lich (by accident)
snippet.description:
SLAYING MY SPIRE TWO. TWICE THE SPIRE. TWICE THE SLAYING. TWICE THE SKELETAL BADDIES.

TWITCH: https://www.twitch.tv/the_grim_kleaper

0:00 Intro
0:09 Act 1 - Apprentice Necromancer (LOSER!)
12:52 Act 2 - He begins to cook
24:22 Act 3 - Immortal lich time

Music used (in order):
Brainiac Maniac (PvZ 1 zomboss music)
Graze the Roof (PvZ 1)
T Station (Age of Empires II)
Watery Graves (PvZ 1)
Albatross - Lexica
Smells like Crickets Tastes like Chicken (Age of Empires II)
Ultimate Battle (PvZ 1)
Terran One (Starcraft 1)
Shamburger (Age of Empires II)
Milkyway - Battle (FTL: Faster than light)
Loonboon (PvZ 1)
Rise of the Bonk (MEGABONK music by Miguelangello960 - https://miguelangell960.bandcamp.com/album/megabonk-ost )
I'm gonna bonk all night (MEGABONK same as above)
Bloons TD Jazz theme by e_soup
Water Graves (PvZ 1)
Brainiac Maniac (same song as in intro) (PvZ 1 zomboss music)

snippet.title: My Shovel vs This Entire Flood - DrainSim
snippet.description:
Dive into DrainSim and seize control of the floods! Clear the city's submerged streets, with a huge range of different tools from rakes to submersible pumps. Embrace the satisfaction of restoring the water flow. Become the city's hero, one drain at a time. In this episode I complete the first few levels of this awesome flood management game. I hope you enjoy this episode of DrainSim, thanks for watching and liking.

More DrainSim: Coming Soon

About DrainSim:

Plan your Mission!
For each mission, you'll receive crucial intel in advance and must carefully plan the tools you want to bring. Consider the time of day, type of terrain, and distance from your generator to your electric tools. Working late into the evening? Don't forget floodlights! Need to drain multiple areas simultaneously? Bring extra pumps and generators! Is there digable Ground? Better bring a Shovel!

With each mission success, you'll earn recognition and unlock new tools and upgrades to boost your drainage capabilities.


Loads of different tools and unique Levels
Armed with an assortment of drain-clearing tools and equipment, from your trusty rake to water pumps, you'll tackle every challenge with precision and skill. From casual players to seasoned pros, DrainSim offers an engaging experience for all who seek the satisfaction of restoring order to the city's drainage system. So dive in, roll up your sleeves, and let DrainSim flush away your concerns one drain at a time.

2nd Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@GastDrae

Become a Channel Member: http://bit.ly/DraeSupport

Discord: https://discord.gg/draegast

My Webpage(Socials & Merch): https://www.draegast.com/

#Drae #Draegast #indiegames

snippet.title: I Survived 100 Days as THE PROTOTYPE in Minecraft!
snippet.description:
► SUBSCRIBE to the Channel! https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCYPYEhWUvvKFgmgkLACagXA?sub_confirmation=1

The Prototype is the most terrifying creature to be revealed in Chapter 5, which is why I put him into Hardcore Minecraft. Now for the next 100 days, I’ll be surviving as the Prototype, using the stolen abilities of other toys to wreak havoc on Playtime Co. Will I be able to stop Giblet and his toy rebels or will I be thrown in the toy box? It was time to find out, as I spawned onto the train tracks as the prototype!

Additional Builds by https://www.youtube.com/@stan616/videos 

MODS USED:

Poppy Playtime MeBesm Edition: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft-bedrock/addons/poppy-playtime-by-mebesm 

Architectury API: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/architectury-api
Armourers Workshop: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/armourers-workshop
Ars Nouveau: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ars-nouveau
Axiom: https://modrinth.com/mod/axiom
MrCrayFish’s Gun Mod Unofficial Port: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mrcrayfishs-gun-mod-unofficial
Clockwork: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/clockwork
CMD Cam: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cmdcam
Create: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create
Custom NPCs: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/custom-npcs
Customizable Player Models: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cpmpvc
Effortless Building: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/effortless-building
Epic Fight: https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight
Geckolib: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib
Iron’s Spell Books: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/irons-spells-n-spellbooks
K-Turrets: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/k-turrets
L_Ender’s Cataclysm: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lendercataclysm
Lucky TNT: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/luckytnt
MC Paint: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mc-paint

This video contains material not suitable for younger audiences.

en.title: I Survived 100 Days as THE PROTOTYPE in Minecraft!
en.description:
► SUBSCRIBE to the Channel! https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCYPYEhWUvvKFgmgkLACagXA?sub_confirmation=1

The Prototype is the most terrifying creature to be revealed in Chapter 5, which is why I put him into Hardcore Minecraft. Now for the next 100 days, I’ll be surviving as the Prototype, using the stolen abilities of other toys to wreak havoc on Playtime Co. Will I be able to stop Giblet and his toy rebels or will I be thrown in the toy box? It was time to find out, as I spawned onto the train tracks as the prototype!

Additional Builds by https://www.youtube.com/@stan616/videos
